source_pr.title: ddl: Fixes the timeout of run `make race`
source_pr.body: It fixes the timeout of run `make race` operation.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing/performance assumptions: on slow CI, the add-index loop can run long enough that the operation can't complete within the test's time budget. This PR stabilizes it by adding an upper bound on inserted rows (break when num > defaultBatchSize*10) to keep the workload bounded.
fix_pattern: Cap test workload (add an upper bound in the loop) to avoid timeouts on slow CI.
